title: Enterprise Knowledge & Document Intelligence
guardrails: Packets are advisory: SOP/policy publication, prompt promotion, KB edits, training exports, and extraction reliance stay in steward-controlled workflows.
Queue review and approve actions write audit events and may enqueue AssistantActionQueueItem rows — they never publish prompts, evidence, or articles silently.

steps: Sign in with settings or reporting edit access.
Open /assistant/enterprise-knowledge-document-intelligence and click Create Sprint 25 packet.
Confirm AssistantEnterpriseKnowledgePacket persists with knowledgeScore and dimensional JSON.
scenarios.passWhen: POST create_packet returns 201 and GET lists the packet without mutating evidence, prompts, review examples, or release gates.

steps: Queue knowledge governance review with optional steward note.
scenarios.passWhen: Status REVIEW_QUEUED and action queue links assistant_enterprise_knowledge_packet.
Status APPROVED; AMP7 source rows unchanged.
